final:
// // This comment suggests the comparator will output LOW when A equals B
module top_module(
    input [1:0] A,
    input [1:0] B,
    output reg EQ
);always @(*) begin
        if(A == B) begin
            EQ = 1;
        end
        else begin
            EQ = 0;
        end
    end
    
endmodule
